_comment: Write the battery pack capacity in mAh. The descriptor declares `mAh`; this body forwards it to the Layer 0 command by reference. Stack converters map to BATT_CAPACITY (ArduPilot) / BAT1_CAPACITY (PX4) and validate read-back.

then.detail: Battery capacity write was accepted but read-back did not match.
Battery capacity parameter write was rejected by the autopilot.
Battery capacity calibration cancelled by operator.
Battery capacity calibration failed with an unhandled outcome — see the audit trace for the underlying response.
